rules.description: TypeScript loaded directly by pi via --experimental-strip-types — no build step, no transpilation
Never create, copy, modify, or delete files in .pi/ — it is the user's runtime testing directory
Source of truth for demo files is demo/, not .pi/
All shared interfaces defined in types.ts — no type definitions elsewhere
Expression evaluator uses property access only — no eval(), no arithmetic/logic
Domain logic lives in YAML specs, templates, and schemas — never in the runtime
Extension owns its own subprocess dispatch — independent of pi-subagents, no shared state
JSON is the intermediate representation between steps — file system is the data bus
State persisted after each step via atomic write (tmp + rename)
{{ var }}/{% tag %} for Nunjucks prompt rendering, ${{ expr }} for workflow data flow — never mix contexts
